entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for seed weight and grain yield across various environments.

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A measured characteristic of pigeon pea genotypes used to assess genotype by environment interaction.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A measured characteristic of pigeon pea genotypes used to assess genotype by environment interaction.

entities.name: GENOTYPE BY ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The effect of the interaction between genotype and environment on the expression of traits.

entities.name: PATTERN ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method applied to identify the grouping of genotypes and environments.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the 11 test environments were located.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India used as a testing environment.

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India used as a testing environment.

entities.name: HARYANA
entities.description: A state in India used as a testing environment.

entities.name: SOIL TYPE
entities.description: The environmental factor that revealed a distinct pattern of genotype by environment interaction.

entities.name: BLACK SOIL
entities.description: A specific soil environment that discriminated genotypes differently.

entities.name: NON-BLACK SOIL
entities.description: A specific soil environment that discriminated genotypes differently.

entities.name: HYBRID
entities.description: Genotypes produced by crossing different pure lines, showing specific adaptation to particular environments.

entities.name: PURE LINE
entities.description: Homozygous genotypes used as controls or for comparison in the study.
